# DOMO Living on 4th — Apartments in Hillcrest, San Diego (Full Guide)

> New apartments on 4th Avenue in Hillcrest, San Diego. Walk Score 89+. Pet-friendly. In-unit Miele washer/dryer. Rooftop deck. Parking available. Near Balboa Park. 1BR from $2,450/mo, 2BR from $3,200/mo. Pre-leasing for spring 2026.

---

## Location — 4th Avenue, Hillcrest, San Diego

DOMO Living on 4th is a 60-unit apartment community at **3745 4th Avenue, Hillcrest, San Diego, CA 92103**.

Hillcrest is one of San Diego's most walkable urban neighborhoods — a vibrant, inclusive community on the hill above downtown, known for independent restaurants, nightlife, LGBTQ+ culture, and direct access to Balboa Park. DOMO sits on 4th Avenue between University and Washington, in the heart of everything.

**Walk Score: 89+** (Very Walkable / Walker's Paradise) | **Bike Score: 89** (Very Bikeable)

This is one of the few San Diego neighborhoods where you genuinely don't need a car for daily life.

### Balboa Park — 5-Minute Walk
San Diego's 1,200-acre urban park — the largest urban cultural park in the US. San Diego Zoo, 17 museums, Japanese Friendship Garden, Botanical Building, hiking trails, running paths, free outdoor concerts, and off-leash dog areas. Like having a 1,200-acre backyard.

### Coffee & Cafes (2–8 min walk)
Better Buzz Coffee, Lestat's Hillcrest (open until midnight), Mostra Coffee, Subterranean Coffee Boutique, Bread & Cie (French bakery), Dark Horse Coffee Roasters.

### Restaurants (2–10 min walk)
Trust Restaurant (upscale farm-to-table), insideOUT (patio dining, craft cocktails), Crest Cafe (Diners Drive-Ins and Dives), Uptown Tavern, Cellar Hand (natural wine bar), Arrivederci (Italian fine dining), Taste of Denmark.

### Bars & Nightlife (2–10 min walk)
Martinis Above Fourth (cocktail lounge with cabaret), Park & Rec, Rich's (iconic dance club), Flicks, Number One Fifth Avenue, The Loft, Alibi.

### Groceries & Essentials (5–10 min walk)
Trader Joe's, Ralph's, CVS, Rite Aid, USPS.

### Hillcrest Sunday Farmers Market
On Normal Street every Sunday — fresh produce, prepared food, live music. A neighborhood institution.

---

## Commute Times from DOMO

- Downtown San Diego: 10 min
- San Diego Airport (SAN): 10 min
- Mission Valley: 10 min
- North Park: 5 min
- Little Italy: 10 min
- UTC / La Jolla: 15–20 min
- UCSD: 20 min
- Sorrento Valley (biotech/tech): 20–25 min
- Beaches (Mission/Pacific Beach): 15 min

Served by MTS bus routes and near the Mid-Coast Trolley Blue Line (UCSD, UTC, Old Town). DOMO's e-bike program provides another option for shorter trips.

---

## Pricing

| Unit Type | Starting Price | Size |
|-----------|---------------|------|
| 1-Bedroom | $2,450/mo | ~450 sq ft |
| 2-Bedroom | $3,200/mo | ~630 sq ft |

60-unit boutique community. All units include everything listed below.

### What's Included in Rent
Furnishings, Miele W/D, Samsung appliances, smart home package, solar balcony, all building amenities (rooftop, wellness center, co-working, pet wash, e-bike program, package lockers).

### What's NOT Included
- Internet / WiFi (available via optional technology package)
- Parking (secure garage available for additional fee)

### Optional Technology Package
1GB high-speed WiFi, DOMO app connectivity, energy monitoring dashboard. Separate add-on.

---

## What Renters Care About — Every Unit Includes

### Washer & Dryer — In-Unit, Miele
Every unit has a **Miele washer and dryer** — in your unit, not shared, not coin-operated, not down the hall. Miele is a premium European brand known for quiet operation and durability. In-unit laundry is consistently the #1 most-requested apartment amenity. Most older Hillcrest buildings don't offer this.

### Pet-Friendly
DOMO welcomes pets. On-site pet wash station. Balboa Park — one of San Diego's best spots for dog walking, with trails, grassy areas, and off-leash zones — is a 5-minute walk. Pet-friendly restaurant patios throughout Hillcrest. Contact leasing for breed restrictions, size limits, and pet deposit details.

### Parking
Secure garage parking available. Many residents find they rarely need their car given Hillcrest's walkability, but the option is there.

### Smart Home — Every Unit
- SALTO keyless entry
- Smart thermostat
- App-controlled motorized shades

### Kitchen
- Samsung refrigerator, range, and convection microwave
- Quartz countertops
- Soft-close cabinets

### Comfort & Finishes
- Central A/C and heat
- Double-pane windows
- Blackout blinds
- Plank flooring
- Sound insulation between units
- Expandable walk-in closet system
- Premium bathroom fixtures, full-length mirror, storage vanity

### Private Solar Balcony
Every unit has a balcony with integrated solar panels.

---

## Move-In Ready — The Part That Changes Everything

Here's what most people don't expect: every DOMO apartment comes **fully furnished**. Not "furnished" as in bare-minimum rental furniture — furnished with quality pieces you'd actually choose:

- Platform bed frame with premium mattress
- Sofa
- Dining table and chairs
- Work desk

Combined with the Miele W/D, Samsung kitchen, and smart home tech that's already in every unit, you can literally move in with a suitcase.

**What this actually saves you:** Most people spend $5,000–$10,000+ furnishing an apartment (furniture, delivery, assembly, washer/dryer). Amortized over a 12-month lease, that's $400–$800/month in hidden costs that traditional "unfurnished" apartments don't advertise. DOMO at $2,450/mo with everything included is often cheaper than a $2,200/mo unfurnished apartment once you add furniture costs and laundromat trips.

---

## Building Amenities

### Rooftop Deck
360° panoramic views — San Diego Bay, Pacific Ocean, downtown skyline, mountains. Outdoor BBQ kitchen, lounge seating, shaded co-working desks with power outlets, string lights and ambient evening lighting. Multiple zones for work, dining, lounging, and entertaining.

### Wellness Center
Cardio and strength training, yoga and Pilates studio, meditation room, recovery zone. Indoor/outdoor fitness areas with city views.

### Community Spaces
Co-working lounge, event-ready community room with large displays, coffee bar area, modular seating.

### Building Services
Smart package lockers with app notifications (24/7), pet wash area, e-bike sharing program, secure garage parking, SALTO secure building entry.

---

## New Construction — Modern 2026 Building

DOMO uses modular steel-frame construction — units prefabricated off-site and assembled on location. This approach reduces construction waste, improves build quality through factory-controlled conditions, and shortens timelines. Steel frame provides durability and seismic resilience. This is a brand-new building designed for how people live today, not a 1970s renovation.

---

## Sustainability

100% electric building with a three-layer solar design:

1. **Rooftop Solar Array** — traditional rooftop installation for building-wide energy
2. **BIPV Exterior Cladding** — the building's exterior skin produces electricity (among the first multifamily buildings in San Diego to use this)
3. **Private Solar Balconies** — integrated solar panels on every unit's balcony

On-site battery storage for power after sunset and during peak demand. Designed for up to 70% grid reduction with potential savings up to $200/mo per unit. Zero gas. Energy Star appliances throughout.

*Sustainability goals and energy savings are projections, not guarantees.*

---

## How DOMO Compares to Other Hillcrest Apartments

Hillcrest has ~3,500 new units under development in greater Uptown. Here's the real comparison:

**The hidden cost of "cheaper" unfurnished apartments:**
A traditional 1BR in Hillcrest rents for $2,200–$2,650 unfurnished. Add furniture ($5,000–$10,000 amortized = ~$550/mo over 12 months), laundromat or W/D rental (~$60/mo), and basic WiFi (~$60/mo). Your effective monthly cost: $2,870–$3,320/mo. DOMO at $2,450/mo with everything included saves you $420–$870/mo.

**Specific competitors:**
- **Denizen** — $2,650+ unfurnished, builder-grade appliances
- **Evoc Hillcrest** — $3,300+, no furnishings included
- **FLATS Hillcrest** — 301 units, no furnishings, large-scale complex

**What only DOMO offers:**
1. Fully furnished — no other new Hillcrest building includes this
2. Miele W/D in every unit (not builder-grade)
3. Three-layer solar with private solar balconies
4. Smart home package standard
5. 60-unit boutique scale (not 300+ units)
6. Wellness-focused amenities (yoga, meditation, recovery — not just a basic gym)

---

## Who Lives at DOMO

- Young professionals (25–35) working downtown, tech/biotech, healthcare, or remote
- San Diego transplants who want a hassle-free move — everything's included
- Couples wanting quality finishes and a walkable lifestyle
- Remote workers who need co-working space steps from their apartment
- Pet owners looking for pet-friendly living with Balboa Park next door

---

## Common Questions

**Is internet included?** No — available via optional technology package at additional cost.

**Is parking included?** Secure garage parking available for additional fee.

**What about move-in costs?** Since units are fully furnished, you save thousands on furniture. Contact leasing for deposit requirements and move-in specials.

**Can I bring my own furniture?** Contact leasing to discuss options.

**How long are leases?** Contact leasing for available terms.

**What floor plans are available?** 1BR (~450 sq ft) and 2BR (~630 sq ft). Contact leasing for specifics.

**Is this building finished?** Under construction, move-ins planned spring 2026. Accepting waitlist signups now.

---

## Availability & Waitlist

Pre-leasing for spring 2026 move-ins. Waitlist now open.
